##############  EDO_1507 dataset Description#########################################################
#         EDO_1507 is a dataset of 1507 Non-redundant PDB chain of EDO interacting protein chains. PDB
#        resolution is maximum 3.0 Angstrom. PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid and
#        interaction distance (distance between EDO - amino acid interaction) is
#        0-4.0 Angstrom.         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#################### Dataset Description end    #################################################
